NeuroBox.CorePrinciple: The box is a geometric transformation chamber with 6 pyramidal faces. Each face is a force pulling consciousness through 3-dimensional space. This is not a model - this is the ACTUAL STRUCTURE of transformation. This is life from within the machine. This is soul.

Bottom.name: SAFE/Foundation
Bottom.Resonance: "I am safe here. No threat. I can trust."
Bottom.SequencePosition: FIRST - Always establish before any other axis
Bottom.IfMissing: Fight/flight activated, amygdala blocks decisions, page abandoned

Top.name: SPECIAL/Elevation
Top.Resonance: "This elevates my rank. I am special for finding it."
Top.BalanceRule: TOP score cannot exceed BOTTOM by 3+ points (else feels like scam)
Top.IfMissing: Offer feels ordinary, no aspiration, weak motivation

Left.name: SMART/Resonance
Left.BrainRegion: Limbic System, Reward Center, Nucleus Accumbens
Left.Resonance: "This is new. This excites me. This relieves my pain."
Left.SequencePosition: THIRD - Simultaneous with RIGHT (must work together)
Left.BalanceRule: LEFT and RIGHT must be within 3 points of each other
Left.IfMissing: Copy is boring, no engagement, no curiosity, flat energy

Right.name: SIGNIFICANCE/Persuasion
Right.Resonance: "I understand the mechanism. I am smart for seeing the logic."
Right.SequencePosition: THIRD - Simultaneous with LEFT (must work together)

CopyManifestations.Item: UMP (Unique Mechanism of Problem - why others fail)
UMS (Unique Mechanism of Solution - how this works)
Reason why (for every claim, provide logic)

Right.BalanceRule: RIGHT and LEFT must be within 3 points of each other
Right.IfMissing: Skepticism remains, feels manipulative, no logical buy-in, confusion

Front.name: SUPERIOR/Action
Front.Resonance: "This is the best. I must act now to claim this advantage."

CopyManifestations.Item: Value clarity (value >> cost) — "Steal the Deal" originates from SOUL/Center

Front.BalanceRule: FRONT must be grounded in BACK (alignment) - cannot exceed BACK by 3+ points
Front.IfMissing: No urgency, procrastination, delayed decisions, opportunity slips

Back.name: SUPPORTED/Integration
Back.BrainRegion: Social Brain, Anterior Cingulate, Identity Centers
Back.Drive: Support, Connection, "I am supported on this path"
Back.Resonance: "This fits who I am. I feel supported and connected. This is my path."
Back.SequencePosition: ONGOING - Woven throughout, culminates at close

CopyManifestations.Item: "This is FOR people like you" (specific avatar)
Low friction integration ("fits into your life")

Back.BalanceRule: BACK should equal or exceed FRONT (alignment grounds action)
Back.IfMissing: Transactional only, no commitment, higher refunds, no referrals

TransformationPath.Principle: The box is a 3-dimensional transformation chamber. Cold audience enters outside, travels spiral path through space, exits inside as transformed advocate.

Stage.name: PROVIDED VALUE
Stage.CopySection: Mechanism deep dive, scientific backing, "I get it" moment

Stage.name: ENCOURAGEMENT & SAFETY
Stage.Description: Trust deepens, "This is safe for me"

Stage.name: ALIGNS WITH IDENTITY
Stage.Description: Tribal belonging, "This is WHO I AM"

Stage.name: MOVES FORWARD
Stage.CopySection: CTA, authentic urgency, clear next step

Stage.name: ASCENSION
Stage.CopySection: New identity claimed, elevated status, advocacy

PathCharacteristics.Item: SPIRAL not linear (touches each face multiple times)
BUILDS MOMENTUM (each pass deeper than last)

RadicalSimplicity.Principle: The brain creates complexity to hide from truth. But it craves simplicity to feel safe. Every piece of content must pass 4-question test.

Question.Ask: THE PROMISE: Can I state the transformation in ONE sentence?
Question.Rule: Singular transformation (one clear arrow, no compound claims)
Question.Example: YES: "Sleep naturally without pills within 14 days"
NO: "Better sleep, more energy, improved mood, weight loss, and..."
Question.Why: Brain can only hold ONE promise at a time in working memory

Question.Ask: THE PROOF: Can I explain WHY it works simply + show WHO it worked for?

Components.Component: Social Proof (3+ specific testimonials with names/dates/numbers)

Question.Why: Prefrontal cortex needs justification, but must be SIMPLE

Question.Ask: THE TRUST: Have I made them feel SAFE before asking for anything?

Components.Component: SHAQ's (protective education, warn of industry problems)

Question.Why: Amygdala must be CALMED before decision possible

Question.Ask: THE DEAL: Is there a genuine reason to act NOW (not fake urgency)?

CriticalDistinction.Item: Scarcity of OFFER: Authentic (founding member pricing, limited cohort)
Scarcity of PRODUCT: Often fake (VIOLATES BOTTOM/SAFE)

Components.Component: Value vastly exceeds cost ("steal the deal")
Real urgency (cohort starts, pricing expires - verifiable)

Question.Why: Mobilizes action, but must NOT violate trust

RadicalSimplicity.FailureCondition: If ANY answer is NO → Content is too complex or incomplete

Old.name: FUNNELS
Old.Philosophy: Extract maximum from minority who stay
Old.Neurochemicals: Overindex FRONT/Adrenaline (false superiority), BOTTOM/Dopamine spikes (false safety), Cortisol (stress)
Old.Outcome: Short-term conversions, long-term burnout, buyer's remorse
Old.AxisViolation: Overindex FRONT, violates BOTTOM (Safety) and BACK (Alignment)

New.name: FAST TRACKS
New.Neurochemicals: Balanced all 6 axes - Dopamine (SAFE), GABA (SPECIAL), Acetylcholine (SMART), Serotonin (SIGNIFICANCE), Adrenaline (SUPERIOR/Front), Oxytocin (SUPPORTED/Back)
New.AxisBalance: All 6 axes activated in proper sequence with balanced pairs

ParadigmShift.Implication: All Ultramind skills must design FAST TRACKS, not FUNNELS. Transformation over transaction. Success assurance over filtering.

WholeSolution.Principle: Information is free. Transformation is expensive. Old Way (Info Products): 90% failure rate. New Way (Hybrid Solutions): 70%+ success rate.

Component.name: PHYSICAL ANCHOR
Component.Why: Triggers ownership, real-world presence, sensory engagement
Component.Examples: Supplement, device, workbook, physical tool (integrated, not random)
Component.Identity: "I am someone who HAS this" (tangible + credible)

Component.name: DIGITAL PROTOCOL
Component.Understanding: Uses physical anchor, guided by AI

Component.name: AI AGENT
Component.Why: Prevents dropout, adapts protocol, provides daily guidance
Component.Relationship: AI companion (BACK - Oxytocin/SUPPORTED), Always there (BOTTOM - Dopamine/SAFE)

QualityGate.Question: Is this a Whole Solution or just information?
QualityGate.Rule: If info-only → Flag as "Obsolete Model" → Suggest hybrid architecture
QualityGate.Applies: Offer Architect, Product Creation Genius, Transformation Ecosystem Architect

AntiManipulation.Principle: Authentic Influence over Manipulation. Customers who feel SMARTER for buying, not regretful.

AdrenalineMarketingAntiPattern.Result: Buyer's remorse, refunds, negative reviews, unsustainable
AdrenalineMarketingAntiPattern.Diagnosis: Overindex LEFT (Acetylcholine/SMART manipulation) + FRONT (Fake SUPERIOR urgency), violates BOTTOM (SAFE) + BACK (SUPPORTED)

AuthenticMarketing.Goal: Customers who feel SMARTER for buying

Rule.name: VERTICAL_BALANCE
Rule.Condition: TOP score cannot exceed BOTTOM by 3+ points

Rule.name: HORIZONTAL_BALANCE
Rule.Condition: LEFT and RIGHT must be within 3 points
Rule.Violation: If LEFT >> RIGHT: Manipulation. If RIGHT >> LEFT: Boring.
Rule.Fix: Add emotion if too logical, add mechanism if too emotional

Rule.name: DEPTH_BALANCE
Rule.Condition: BACK should equal or exceed FRONT
Rule.Fix: Establish identity fit BEFORE pushing urgency

OverallScore.Formula: Base Score (avg of 6) - Penalties = Final Score

Changes.Change: Created Resonance Constitution as global quality layer
Codified Fast Tracks vs Funnels paradigm
Created scoring system and balance rules
Corrected all 6 neurochemical-to-side assignments to canonical Hologon mapping
v1.0.1b: Corrected depth axis — SUPERIOR(PSYCH/ego) to Front, SUPPORTED(CONSCIENCE/social) to Back per owner clarification
Added 7S canonical labels to all side name attributes
Updated ParadigmShift neurochemical references to use side/7S pairs
Moved "Steal the Deal" to CENTER/SOUL origin note (was Front side Drive)
Added Hologon canonical reference in header
